verification.note: Reus-Muns, Jaisinghani, Sankhe, Chowdhury, 'Trust in 5G Open RANs through Machine Learning: RF Fingerprinting on the POWDER PAWR Platform', IEEE GLOBECOM 2020 (GENESYS Lab, Northeastern; open PDF genesys-lab.org/papers/Globecom-Fingerprinting.pdf, verified verbatim via pdftotext). TRIPLET network (metric learning), base-station identification, trained on one day and tested on a DIFFERENT day -> 92.97% (verbatim: 'trained and tested on different days is 92.97%', Fig. 7b) -- a +16.7 pt improvement over the baseline CNN's 76.24% on the cross-day channel-robustness task. Our cross_day track matches this -> from_paper. Distinct model (triplet) from powder-cnn-paper.
